title: KILLTUBE
titleNative: KILLTUBE
synopsis: KILLTUBE is a animated project that exudes the theme "Edopunk". It depicts Tokyo's Shibuya and Shinjuku districts in a parallel world, where the Edo shogunate has closed off Japan and carried on for over four centuries into 2026. In this isolated, stratified society, the only way to change one's standing in life is through participating in live-streamed mortal combat. The battle entertainment story unfolds when an unlikely trio from the lowest depths of society withstand ridicule and aim for the top. As they win over the general public, they discover the hidden truth behind the KILLTUBE system. (Source: Anime News Network, edited)

title: Jeremy no Ki
titleNative: ジェレミーの木
synopsis: Based on a children's picture book of the same name. A Christmas tale about a bird who was raised by tree after it was abandoned. The tree was then cut down for people in the city to use for Christmas celebrations. The bird desperately is trying to find its adoptive tree mother with the help of Jeremy, a penniless orphan, who heard her story so they go and search every tree being used in town. The search in the cold takes a toll on Jeremy until Santa Claus appears, but is it really him?

titleRomaji: Feng Qi Luoyang: Shuangzi Zhui Xiong
titleNative: 风起洛阳之双子追凶
synonyms: Feng Qi Luoyang: Shuangzi Zhui Xiong
ฆาตกรรมแห่งลั่วหยาง
synopsis: After the turmoil of the fox demon seducing the scholars subsided, the city of God returned to its former prosperity and bustle. Empress Wu was in a good mood and decided to hold a grand autumn hunt, inviting princes, nobles and people who were good at martial arts to gather together to compete on horseback and archery. Murong Ji, the young Khan of Tuyuhun, was also invited to participate in the autumn hunt, but accidentally became a "suspect" in a conspiracy to assassinate the empress. Murong Ji had no choice but to ask Pei Kun for help, hoping that he could help find the real murderer and clear his name. In order to protect the peace of the Tang Dynasty and the people, and to help his friends, Pei Kun, Yuchi Zhu, Han Dongqing and other partners once again joined forces to investigate the case. There were constant dangers and jokes along the way, and finally the real culprit who planned to assassinate Empress Wu was tracked down, and a fight between the Tang Dynasty and Tuyuhun was pr

title: Sengoku Youko: The Thousandfold Chaos Arc
titleEnglish: Sengoku Youko: The Thousandfold Chaos Arc
titleNative: 戦国妖狐 千魔混沌編
synopsis: The second and third cours of Sengoku Youko , adapting the "Thousandfold Chaos" arc. The chaotic aftermath of a confrontation between Jinka Yamato and Yazen results in the power dynamics between the magically gifted katawara and humans being turned upside down. As the news of the downfall of dangaishu—the katawara-hunting monks led by Yazen—spreads across the country, rogue groups of katawara start to form, worsening the already-fragile relationship between them and humanity. Having lost faith in his abilities, Shinsuke Hyoudou now spends his time heavily drinking in the company of Senya, a former enemy of his who controls one thousand katawara within his body. Senya indirectly causes the death of the father of Tsukiko, his newfound friend, after a surprise attack of a local god gone berserk. Despite the circumstances, Tsukiko holds no grudge against Senya and is determined to become Shinsuke's disciple no matter what. Although Shinsuke refuses to become Tsukiko's sword instructor, he

synonyms: 劇場版 ケロロ軍曹
synopsis: The Keroro Platoon, living their lazy days as if invasion were nothing. Then one day, they face a series of bizarre phenomena erupting across the nation. Feeling a sense of crisis, the Keroro Platoon rises up, staking their pride as invaders! What is the meaning of the mysterious symbols they encounter wherever they go. The largest-scale battle in the history of "Sgt.Frog" begins in the Reiwa era! (Source: Crunchyroll News, edited) Note: Relations are provisional and will be updated when more info is announced.
